title: Dakota Poker Tour

sampleRows: Poker Brat Black Chip BOUNTY Tournament

The Windbreak will feature a 1-day Bounty Tournament! Single Day Event Registration opens at 11am, cards will be in the air at NOON! Buy-in is $200 (20,000 chips). One-time add-on for $100 (20,000 chips) is available until registration closes. (must have chips to add on) For each player you take out, you earn a $100 bounty! Late registration, & add-ons are open through dinner break. (Approximately 4:30 pm) Suggested Dealer appreciation $20 - Tips are appreciated but not mandatory to play
